untranslatable_reason: The BAB strategy requires ranking securities by beta within asset classes and constructing long/short decile portfolios. Beta calculation (historical volatility of security relative to market) is not available in the allowed indicators list. Additionally, the strategy operates at the portfolio construction level (multi-security ranking and decile selection) rather than at the single-instrument technical indicator level. This requires custom beta computation, cross-security ranking logic, and portfolio-level rebalancing that cannot be expressed using only price-based technical indicators.
translation_notes: Signal SSRN_2049939_14 is a factor-based portfolio construction strategy fundamentally incompatible with single-instrument technical rule translation. The core mechanic (beta ranking and decile sorting across asset classes) requires factor model inputs and portfolio-level logic outside the scope of the allowed indicator set. Recommend implementing as a separate factor-model backtest module rather than a technical rule engine rule.
